276 I1200_GERD_CD I1200_GERD_CD I1200 Active Diagnoses: Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of gastoresophageal reflux disease (GERD) or ulcer (e.g., esophageal, gasric and peptic ulcers) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
